title: Best Time to Buy and Sell Stock with Transaction Fee
titleCn: 买卖股票的最佳时机含手续费

testcases.input: prices = [1,3,2,8,4,9], fee = 2 Output: 8 Explanation: The maximum profit can be achieved by: - Buying at prices[0] = 1 - Selling at prices[3] = 8 - Buying at prices[4] = 4 - Selling at prices[5] = 9 The total profit is ((8 - 1) - 2) + ((9 - 4) - 2) = 8.
testcases.expectedOutput: 8 Explanation: The maximum profit can be achieved by: - Buying at prices[0] = 1 - Selling at prices[3] = 8 - Buying at prices[4] = 4 - Selling at prices[5] = 9 The total profit is ((8 - 1) - 2) + ((9 - 4) - 2) = 8.
